plugins.name: claude-md
plugins.description: Generate and maintain a high-quality CLAUDE.md (Karpathy discipline + Anthropic best-practices + adaptive parallel-git workflow) via an idempotent managed block, plus /learn — append a rule whenever Claude makes a mistake (compounding engineering).

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Hook-enforced, branch-aware, ephemeral session handoff — auto-preserves open work to a per-branch, git-tracked docs/handoff/<branch>.md (status active|blocked, + derived board) so parallel branches/worktrees never collide; resolve deletes finished handoffs and prune clears merged/orphaned ones. The next session, even on another machine, continues seamlessly.
